name: Oven-Baked Herb Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the potatoes into about 1/4 inch thick slices.
2. Brush each slice with vegetable oil.
3. Place the slices in a baking pan.
4. Sprinkle with thyme and oregano.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes, or until tender.
Serves 4
